# render-detail

Renders the exports facet as a section in the plugin detail pane: runtime export groups with per-symbol category badges and consumer links.

## Plugin reference

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-plugin exports section in the plugin detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginViewSlots.Section` "exports" → `ExportsDetailSection`
